ns0:entry.ns0:title: GH05TCREW/pentestagent
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/GH05TCREW/pentestagent
Language: python
PentestAgent is an AI agent framework for black-box security testing, supporting bug bounty, red-team, and penetration testing workflows.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: NVlabs/Eagle
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/NVlabs/Eagle
Language: python
Eagle: Frontier Vision-Language Models with Data-Centric Strategies

ns0:entry.ns0:title: OpenBMB/VoxCPM
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/OpenBMB/VoxCPM
Language: python
VoxCPM2: Tokenizer-Free TTS for Multilingual Speech Generation, Creative Voice Design, and True-to-Life Cloning

ns0:entry.ns0:title: OpenMOSS/MOSS-TTS
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/OpenMOSS/MOSS-TTS
Language: python
MOSS‑TTS Family is an open‑source speech and sound generation model family from MOSI.AI and the OpenMOSS team. It is designed for high‑fidelity, high‑expressiveness, and complex real‑world scenarios, covering stable long‑form speech, multi‑speaker dialogue, voice/character design, environmental sound effects, and real‑time streaming TTS.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: PaddlePaddle/PaddleOCR
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/PaddlePaddle/PaddleOCR
Language: python
Turn any PDF or image document into structured data for your AI. A powerful, lightweight OCR toolkit that bridges the gap between images/PDFs and LLMs. Supports 100+ languages.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ai-boost/awesome-harness-engineering
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ai-boost/awesome-harness-engineering
Language: python
Awesome list for AI agent harness engineering: tools, patterns, evals, memory, MCP, permissions, observability, and orchestration.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: anthropics/claude-code
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/anthropics/claude-code
Language: python
Claude Code is an agentic coding tool that lives in your terminal, understands your codebase, and helps you code faster by executing routine tasks, explaining complex code, and handling git workflows - all through natural language commands.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: dreammis/social-auto-upload
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/dreammis/social-auto-upload
Language: python
自动化上传视频到社交媒体：抖音、小红书、视频号、tiktok、youtube、bilibili

ns0:entry.ns0:title: fastapi/fastapi
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/fastapi/fastapi
Language: python
FastAPI framework, high performance, easy to learn, fast to code, ready for production

ns0:entry.ns0:title: galilai-group/stable-worldmodel
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/galilai-group/stable-worldmodel
Language: python
A platform for reproducible world model research and evaluation

ns0:entry.ns0:title: harry0703/MoneyPrinterTurbo
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/harry0703/MoneyPrinterTurbo
Language: python
利用AI大模型，一键生成高清短视频 Generate short videos with one click using AI LLM.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: microsoft/markitdown
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/microsoft/markitdown
Language: python
Python tool for converting files and office documents to Markdown.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: opendatalab/MinerU
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/opendatalab/MinerU
Language: python
Transforms complex documents like PDFs and Office docs into LLM-ready markdown/JSON for your Agentic workflows.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: shiyu-coder/Kronos
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/shiyu-coder/Kronos
Language: python
Kronos: A Foundation Model for the Language of Financial Markets

ns0:entry.ns0:title: zakirkun/deep-eye
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/zakirkun/deep-eye
Language: python
Deep Eye orchestrates multiple AI providers (OpenAI, Claude, Grok, Gemini, OLLAMA, Groq, Mistral, OpenRouter, LiteLLM, LM Studio) for intelligent payload generation, scans targets for 45+ vulnerability types, and produces professional reports with compliance mapping.
